Welcome to EduScan PH

Attendance tracking built for the way you actually teach — scan a QR code, and you're done. No internet required.

You Know This Routine

Calling out names one by one. Tallying marks by hand. Computing the attendance rate yourself for every report.

Manually call out names
Tally attendance by hand
Compute % rates yourself

One Scan Replaces All Three

Scan a student's QR code and EduScan PH logs them, tallies the class, and computes the attendance rate — automatically, instantly.

Juan D. — marked Present
Today's rate: 93.3% — calculated for you

Works Without Internet

Every scan, every class, every QR code is generated and saved right on your device. Sync to the cloud whenever you're back online — nothing is lost in the meantime.

No internet? Still scans. Still saves. Still works.

Start and dismissal are just this class period's own times — both can fall in the morning or afternoon (e.g. 7:30–8:30 AM). Late triggers after start time + grace; not scanned out by dismissal time + grace counts as missing a PM scan in the SF2 report.

🏫 School details for SF2 report

Filled in once — printed on every SF2 you generate. Section is taken from the class name.

SF2 covers the full calendar month. Select a class above before generating.

Sync to Google Sheets

🔄 Auto-sync active

🔐 Managed Sync Setup

If your private Google Sheet was already configured during onboarding, paste your unique Sync URL below to connect this app to your data.

Don't have a Sync URL yet? Set one up yourself →
  1. Create a new Google Sheet, then go to Extensions → Apps Script.
  2. Paste in the EduScan PH sync script (ask your administrator or check the EduScan PH documentation for the latest script code).
  3. Click Deploy → New deployment, choose type Web app, set "Who has access" to Anyone, then deploy.
  4. Copy the generated .../exec URL and paste it into the Sync URL field below.

Term Report

DepEd 3-term calendar: Term 1 (Jun–Sep) · Term 2 (Oct–Dec) · Term 3 (Jan–Mar)

🏫 School Year Calendar

Set the exact first day of classes. The app will automatically calculate Term 1, 2, and 3 based on DepEd standards.

Select a class to view students.

EduScan PH
Offline-first attendance tracker
✅ EduScan PH is already installed!

⚠️ Chrome & Firefox can't install apps on iOS

Apple only allows Safari to install web apps to the home screen. Copy this page's URL, open Safari, paste it, then follow the steps below.

How to install

💡 Once installed, EduScan PH works fully offline — no internet needed to scan. Data syncs to Google Sheets whenever you're back online.

📦 Export Data

Export all your data as a JSON backup file — includes classes, students, logs, and settings.

⏱ Auto-Export

Automatically download a JSON backup on a schedule.

⏱ Auto-export active

📥 Import / Restore

Restore data from a previously exported JSON file. This will merge with existing data.
